isolation.surface: Deployed Vercel routes validated via browser refresh checks and HTTP status/header evidence

steps.action: Open deployed non-root routes and capture route-specific content before refresh
steps.expected: Route-specific content is present on each route
steps.observed: Each route displayed its route-specific h1/title before reload: About, Projects, Contact, Blog, and Shipping a Minimal Portfolio with Astro

steps.action: Reload each deployed route and capture content again
steps.expected: Path/content remain stable and do not rewrite to home
steps.observed: After reload, each route kept the same pathname and h1 content; no route rewrote to Home

steps.action: Collect deployed status/header evidence for each valid route
steps.expected: Valid deployed routes return 200 with Vercel response headers
steps.observed: All required valid routes returned HTTP 200 with `server: Vercel` and expected static HTML content-type

evidence.summary: Deployed refresh behavior preserved route-specific content for all required valid non-root routes and one blog slug route.

assertions.title: Deployed unknown routes return not-found behavior

steps.action: Open unknown deployed routes `/does-not-exist` and `/blog/does-not-exist` in browser
steps.expected: Not-found UI renders and does not show stale article or home content
steps.observed: Both routes rendered Not Found title/h1; article count remained 0 and Home heading was absent

steps.action: Collect status/header evidence for unknown deployed routes
steps.expected: Unknown deployed routes return observable 404 semantics
steps.observed: Both unknown routes returned HTTP 404 Not Found with `server: Vercel` headers

evidence.summary: Unknown deployed routes consistently resolved to not-found UI and HTTP 404 semantics, with no home-page rewrite.

summary: Validated deployed-route assertions VAL-CROSS-004 and VAL-CROSS-005 on https://devblog-ten-brown.vercel.app with browser screenshots and status/header evidence.
